title: Implement local-tree audit → synthetic-base review PR
description: Build the ai-review 'audit' and 'ready' subcommands per docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-08-local-audit-review-pr-design.md. Local-tree file collection (src/sources.ts), both-provider audit core refactor (src/audit.ts), orphan-base review-PR machinery + AI audit label + makeReady (src/audit-pr.ts), artifact output, 403→issue fallback, and tests. Requires GitHub App contents:write scope on both apps.

title: Rewrite pr-loop developer↔reviewer communication flow
description: After the local-audit feature lands, redesign the pr-loop slash command (/Users/joe/.claude/commands/pr-loop.md). Current rough edges: 7.5-min polling cadence, reply/resolve mechanics, draft handling, and the developer-agent ↔ AI-reviewer-agent back-and-forth. Needs its own brainstorm/design pass, not a bolt-on. Depends on the audit feature.
